themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "For the tribe of the children of Reuben according to the house of their fathers, and the trib...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַֽחֲצִי֙: their inheritance and half - the half or middle".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "צַ֞ו: Command - (intensively) to constitute, enjoin".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The two tribes and the half tribe have received their inheritance on this side Jordan near Je...". Word-study detail reinforces "יְרֵח֖וֹ: near Jericho - jericho or jerecho, a place in palestine".
